---
title: "Scuba Diving"
format: html
---
::: {.callout-note}
# Diving Certifications 
- NAUI Open Water Scuba Diver 
- NAUI Open Water Scuba Diver
- NAUI Rescue Diver 
- NAUI Nitrox Diver 
- AAUS Lead Diver 
- AAUS Scientific Diving 
- Diver's Alert Network First Aid, CPR/O2 
:::

::: {.callout-note}
# About My Diving Experience
I have completed over 20 dives along the Santa Barbara coastline including
recreational, training, and scientific diving focusing on kelp forest ecosystems and
marine biodiversity.
:::
# Scuba Diving Photography 

![](fish.jpeg){width=60% height=60%}

*Garibaldi Fish at Refugio State Beach, March 2026* 

![](scuba.jpg){width=50% height=60%}
*Anacapa Island Kelp Forest, November 2025* 


# Dive Site Interactive Map

<div id="map" style="height: 600px;"></div>
<link rel="stylesheet"
href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">

<!-- Load Leaflet CSS -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css"/>

<!-- Load Leaflet JavaScript -->
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet/dist/leaflet.js"></script>

<script>

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  // ============================
  // CREATE MAP
  // ============================

  // Center map on Santa Barbara Channel
  var map = L.map('map').setView([34.3, -119.7], 9);

  // Add OpenStreetMap basemap
  L.tileLayer(
    'https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png',
    {
      attribution: '© OpenStreetMap'
    }
  ).addTo(map);

  // ============================
  // ASSIGN COLORS TO DIVE TYPES
  // ============================

  function getColor(type) {

    if (type.includes("OW Training")) {
      return "#1f78b4"; // Blue
    }

    if (type.includes("Recreational")) {
      return "#33a02c"; // Green
    }

    if (type.includes("AAUS")) {
      return "#e31a1c"; // Red
    }

    if (type.includes("Pool")) {
      return "#6a3d9a"; // Purple
    }

    if (type.includes("Beach")) {
      return "#ff7f00"; // Orange
    }

    return "#666666"; // Gray fallback
  }

  // ============================
  // DIVE DATA
  // ============================

  var dives = [

    // ---------- OPEN WATER TRAINING ----------

    {
      site: "Goldfish Bowl",
      lat: 34.01431684246292, 
      lon: -119.43691633538376,
      depth: 38,
      time: 30,
      type: "OW Training",
      notes: "Slightly cold"
    },

    {
      site: "Amphitheater",
      lat: 34.0167804681726, 
      lon: -119.43145562491432, 
      depth: 40,
      time: 34,
      type: "OW Training",
      notes: "Need better buoyancy control"
    },

    {
      site: "Scorpion Rock",
      lat: 34.0478488652378, 
      lon: -119.54710823355087,
      depth: 44,
      time: 28,
      type: "OW Training",
      notes: "Good conditions"
    },

    // ---------- BEACH DIVE ----------

    {
      site: "Leadbetter Beach",
      lat: 34.402477854459015,
      lon: -119.6985202814177,
      depth: 15,
      time: 20,
      type: "Beach Dive",
      notes: "Very turbulent, low visibility"
    },

    // ---------- RECREATIONAL DIVES ----------

    {
      site: "Cat Rock",
      lat: 34.00516462453085,
      lon: -119.42375340996594,
      depth: 40,
      time: 36,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Need more navigation practice"
    },

    {
      site: "Harbor Cove",
      lat: 34.028592673822395, 
      lon: -119.68657460814796,
      depth: 40,
      time: 50,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Felt comfortable"
    },

    {
      site: "Underwater Island",
      lat: 34.0125, 
      lon: -119.3508,
      depth: 50,
      time: 45,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Strong current toward end"
    },

    {
      site: "Big Rock",
      lat: 34.03142,
      lon: -119.34442,
      depth: 40,
      time: 37,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Heavy current"
    },

    {
      site: "Goldfish Bowl (Dive 2)",
      lat: 34.01431684246292, 
      lon: -119.43691633538376,
      depth: 44,
      time: 50,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Current, decent visibility"
    },

    {
      site: "Goldfish Bowl (Dive 3)",
      lat: 34.01431684246292, 
      lon: -119.43691633538376,
      depth: 35,
      time: 40,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Current, decent visibility"
    },

    {
      site: "Lips (Dive 1)",
      lat: 34.04932664801832,
      lon: -119.55555464681474, 
      depth: 32,
      time: 38,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Good visibility"
    },

    {
      site: "Lips (Dive 2)",
      lat: 34.04932664801832,
      lon: -119.55555464681474, 
      depth: 32,
      time: 32,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Low current"
    },

    {
      site: "Fry Harbor",
      lat: 34.032,
      lon: -119.453,
      depth: 60,
      time: 20,
      type: "Recreational",
      notes: "Very turbulent, low visibility"
    },

    // ---------- AAUS TRAINING ----------

    {
      site: "Chalk Cove",
      lat: 33.44451358821106, 
      lon: -118.48862113991959,
      depth: 25,
      time: 53,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Fish survey practice"
    },

    {
      site: "Chalk Cove Rescue Drill",
      lat: 33.44451358821106, 
      lon: -118.48862113991959,
      depth: 10,
      time: 10,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Rescue drill"
    },

    {
      site: "USC Dock Night Dive",
      lat: 33.44507752614589, 
      lon: -118.48407325627157, 
      depth: 28,
      time: 37,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Night dive"
    },

    {
      site: "USC Dock Training",
      lat: 33.44507752614589, 
      lon: -118.48407325627157, 
      depth: 30,
      time: 25,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Scientific diving training"
    },

    // ---------- CAMPUS POINT ----------

    {
      site: "Campus Point Beach",
      lat: 34.407689156588674,   
      lon: -119.84418304713593, 
      depth: 20,
      time: 10,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Kelp forest dive"
    },

    {
      site: "Campus Point Beach",
      lat: 34.407689156588674,   
      lon: -119.84418304713593, 
      depth: 25,
      time: 30,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Scientific diving"
    },

    {
      site: "Campus Point",
      lat: 34.407689156588674,   
      lon: -119.84418304713593, 
      depth: 24,
      time: 24,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Training dive"
    },

    {
      site: "Campus Point Short Dive",
      lat: 34.407689156588674,   
      lon: -119.84418304713593, 
      depth: 23,
      time: 7,
      type: "AAUS Training",
      notes: "Weight check dive"
    },

    // ---------- REC CENTER POOL DIVES ----------

    {
      site: "Rec Center Pool Dive #1",
      lat: 34.41812416371008, 
      lon: -119.84995265761916, 
      depth: 17,
      time: 40,
      type: "Pool Dive",
      notes: "Scientific diving pool session"
    },

    {
      site: "Rec Center Pool Dive #2",
      lat: 34.41812416371008, 
      lon: -119.84995265761916, 
      depth: 17,
      time: 40,
      type: "Pool Dive",
      notes: "Scientific diving pool session"
    },

    {
      site: "Rec Center Pool Dive #3",
      lat: 34.41812416371008, 
      lon: -119.84995265761916, 
      depth: 17,
      time: 40,
      type: "Pool Dive",
      notes: "Scientific diving pool session"
    },

    {
      site: "Rec Center Pool Dive #4",
      lat: 34.41812416371008, 
      lon: -119.84995265761916, 
      depth: 17,
      time: 40,
      type: "Pool Dive",
      notes: "Scientific diving pool session"
    }

  ];
// ============================
// FISH ICONS COLORED BY DIVE TYPE
// ============================

function getIcon(type) {

  let color = "#666666";
  let symbol = "fa-fish";

  if (type.includes("AAUS")) {
    color = "#e31a1c";      // red
    symbol = "fa-microscope";
  }

  else if (type.includes("Recreational")) {
    color = "#33a02c";      // green
    symbol = "fa-fish";
  }

  else if (type.includes("OW Training")) {
    color = "#1f78b4";      // blue
    symbol = "fa-life-ring";
  }

  else if (type.includes("Beach")) {
    color = "#ff7f00";      // orange
    symbol = "fa-water";
  }

  else if (type.includes("Pool")) {
    color = "#6a3d9a";      // purple
    symbol = "fa-person-swimming";
  }

  return L.divIcon({
    html: `
      <div style="
        font-size:28px;
        color:${color};
        text-align:center;
        line-height:28px;
      ">
        <i class="fas ${symbol}"></i>
      </div>
    `,
    className: "",
    iconSize: [30,30],
    iconAnchor: [15,15]
  });

}
// ============================
// ADD MARKERS
// ============================

dives.forEach(function(dive) {

  var marker = L.marker(
    [dive.lat, dive.lon],
    {
      icon: getIcon(dive.type)
    }
  ).addTo(map);

  marker.bindPopup(
    "<b>" + dive.site + "</b><br>" +
    "<b>Dive Type:</b> " + dive.type + "<br>" +
    "<b>Depth:</b> " + dive.depth + " ft<br>" +
    "<b>Bottom Time:</b> " + dive.time + " min<br>" +
    "<b>Notes:</b> " + dive.notes
  );

});

// ============================
// MAP LEGEND
// ============================

var legend = L.control({
  position: 'bottomright'
});

legend.onAdd = function () {

  var div = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'info legend');

  div.style.backgroundColor = "white";
  div.style.padding = "10px";
  div.style.border = "2px solid black";
  div.style.borderRadius = "5px";
  div.style.lineHeight = "1.6em";

 div.innerHTML =
  "<b>Dive Type</b><br>" +
  "<span style='color:#e31a1c'><i class='fas fa-microscope'></i></span> AAUS Training<br>" +
  "<span style='color:#33a02c'><i class='fas fa-fish'></i></span> Recreational<br>" +
  "<span style='color:#1f78b4'><i class='fas fa-life-ring'></i></span> OW Training<br>" +
  "<span style='color:#ff7f00'><i class='fas fa-water'></i></span> Beach Dive<br>" +
  "<span style='color:#6a3d9a'><i class='fas fa-person-swimming'></i></span> Pool Dive";

  return div;   // IMPORTANT FIX
};

legend.addTo(map);

});   // closes document.addEventListener

</script>

## Map Code

The code used to create this interactive map can be found in my GitHub repository:

[View Map Code on GitHub](https://github.com/kierramiller/kierramiller.github.io)
